mapper.sql: id, title, subtitle, button_text, target_url, image_url, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into `home_banner` (title, subtitle, button_text, target_url, image_url, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{title}, #{subtitle}, #{buttonText}, #{targetUrl}, #{imageUrl}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update `home_banner` set title = #{title}, subtitle = #{subtitle}, button_text = #{buttonText}, target_url = #{targetUrl}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
update `home_banner` set status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select from `home_banner` where status = 1 order by sort_order asc, id asc
select from `home_banner` order by sort_order asc, id asc
